top_signals.title: Options Traders Look Past Jobs Data as Inflation Takes Spotlight
top_signals.summary: Wall Street traders expect a strong jobs report on Friday. That may not be enough to soothe them, as the war-fueled oil price shock increasingly shifts the focus toward inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: AI Funding Boom Reaches Muni Market With Google-Tied Bond Sale
top_signals.summary: Google parent Alphabet Inc. is poised to enter the municipal-bond market’s prepaid energy space by participating in a $1 billion transaction out of California, a major development in the evolution of a booming segment.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Gold Fields, Cree First Nation sign IBA for Windfall project in Quebec
top_signals.summary: Gold Fields plans to bring the mine into production by the end of 2026 or early 2027, eventually ramping up to 300,000oz annually.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Aya logs bonanza silver hits at Zgounder mine in Morocco
top_signals.summary: Zgounder is one of the world’s few silver-only operations.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: AI Summit London turns 10 as businesses move past the AI hype cycle
top_signals.summary: A decade ago, AI conferences were still largely populated by researchers and a relatively small group of technologists trying to convince businesses the technology would eventually matter. But this year’s AI Summit London arrives in a very different climate. The event, which returns to Tobacco Dock on 10 and 11 June as part of London [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
